message:
feat(wezterm): complete WeztermInterface Cx-first trait extension (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Extends the trait-level Cx-first migration started in ticks 27-28 to
cover the full send_text family, get_pane_direction, and
pane_tiered_scrollback_summary. Every trait method on
`WeztermInterface` that has a corresponding concrete Cx-first impl on
`WeztermClient` (from ticks 19-22) now has a trait default +
WeztermClient override.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/wezterm.rs (+214 src)

   Eight new default methods on `WeztermInterface` (all asupersync-runtime
   gated, all default to their non-cx counterpart):

     * `send_text_with_cx`
     * `send_text_no_paste_with_cx`
     * `send_text_with_options_with_cx`
     * `send_control_with_cx`
     * `send_ctrl_c_with_cx`
     * `send_ctrl_d_with_cx`
     * `get_pane_direction_with_cx`
     * `pane_tiered_scrollback_summary_with_cx`

   Matching eight overrides on `WeztermClient` impl, each routing to
   the concrete Cx-first method (e.g.
   `WeztermClient::send_text_with_cx` from tick 20) which threads cx
   through `MuxPool::send_paste_with_cx` / `MuxPool::write_to_pane_with_cx`
   on the fast path. CLI fallback still delegates to legacy per
   tick 20 rationale.

   All other `WeztermInterface` impls (`Arc<dyn WeztermInterface>`,
   `UnifiedClient`, `MockWezterm`, `FailingMockWezterm`) get the
   defaults via trait default — zero code changes needed. Strictly
   additive.

Impact: `WeztermInterface` trait now has Cx-first variants for all
12 pane read/write/lifecycle methods that the WeztermClient impl
supports on the Cx-aware path. Downstream consumers threading Cx
can reach the concrete Cx-first path transparently through the
trait dispatch. Next: extend `WeztermInterface` trait defaults for
lifecycle (spawn, activate_pane, kill_pane, zoom_pane, split_pane)
— those are CLI-only so the trait extension provides zero Cx
benefit on WeztermClient; value would come only from future Cx-aware
impls.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib wezterm::: 160/160 pass
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
